text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In preparation for the Fan Fest, Special Week and
company are rehearsing their costumed hero play.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, El Condor Pasa distances herself,
claiming she can't participate because she's
chosen a different path.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But it was just a lie to shock everyone! She
surprises her friends by jumping into practice.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa has fun practicing for the hero
play with all of her friends.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The qualities of an entertainer—a focus on fun
and amazement—are an important virtue she
inherited from her father.
